summary: All findings from previous rounds addressed. The major finding is fixed: test_remove_by_prefix_fallback_on_parse_error now patches subprocess.run with a side_effect that raises TimeoutExpired on the 'show' call, exercising the exception-handling branch in _list_firewall_rules_by_prefix (lines 551-553). Delete calls are filtered correctly via 'delete' in c[0][0] (element membership in the command list). All 3 tests pass the litmus test. No remaining findings.
